positive.stdout:

    dani_shapiro != boston).

    dani_shapiro != family_history).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    novel(family_history)).

    ~novel(X0) | ~podcast(X0)).

    family_secrets != boston).

    podcast(family_secrets)).

for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,
